settings.title: Zilungiselelo
settings.browserNotificationsDenied: Izaziso zivinjelwe. Yanika amandla kumasethingi ebhrawuza.
settings.commentsDesc: Uma umuntu ebhala amazwana kokuthunyelwe kwakho
settings.quietHoursDesc: Misa izaziso kusukela ngo-10 ebusuku kuya ku-8 ekuseni
settings.privateAccountDesc: Abalandeli abagunyaziwe kuphela abangabona okuqukethwe kwakho
settings.publicProfileDesc: Yenza iphrofayela yakho ibonakale kuwo wonke umuntu
settings.followVisibilityDesc: Lawula ukuthi abanye babona kanjani izibalo zakho zenhlalo
settings.searchEngineIndexingDesc: Vumela izinjini zokusesha ukufaka iphrofayela yakho
settings.defaultPostVisibilityDesc: Kusebenza kukho konke okuthunyelwe kwamanje nokwesikhathi esizayo
settings.postVisibilityNote: Ukushintsha lokhu kuzobuyekeza ukubonakala kwakho konke okuthunyelwe kwakho okukhona futhi kusethe okuzenzakalelayo okokusha.
settings.whoCanMessageDesc: Lawula ukuthi ubani ongakuthumela imilayezo eqondile
settings.extractDataDesc: Landa ikhophi yayo yonke idatha yakho
settings.dataExportSubmitted: Isicelo sokuthumela idatha sesithunyelwe. Uzothola i-imeyili uma idatha yakho isilungile.
settings.geoBlockingDesc: Vimbela abasebenzisi bamazwe athile ukubona okuqukethwe kwakho
settings.filterExplicitDesc: Fihla okuthunyelwe okuphawulwe njengokusobala noma okwabadala
settings.enableContentWarningsDesc: Bonisa izexwayiso ngaphambi kokubonisa okuqukethwe okubucayi
settings.readReceiptsDesc: Vumela abanye bazi uma ufunde imilayezo yabo
settings.e2eEncryptionDesc: Bethela yonke imilayezo yakho ukuze uvikeleke kangcono
settings.upgradeStorage: Khulisa ukubamba kwakho noma uthuthukele ku-premium ukuvula isitoreji esengeziwe
settings.loginDescription: Ngena ukufinyelela nokuphatha izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho.

drawers.ppvDescription: Khokha kanye ukuvula lokhu okuqukethwe okukhethekile unomphela! 💎
drawers.gatedDescription: Bamba amathokheni adingekayo ukubona lokhu okuqukethwe! 🔓

assistant.title: Umsizi
assistant.welcome: Sebenzisa ibhokisi lombhalo elingezansi noma lezi zinkinobho zezenzo ukuqala.
assistant.welcomeAlt: Sawubona! Ngibuze noma yini, kungaba mayelana neDeHub noma cha, ngingasiza.
assistant.errorGeneric: Uxolo, ngibe nephutha. Sicela uzame futhi.
assistant.alwaysSpeakRepliesDesc: Khuluma zonke izimpendulo, hhayi izwi kuphela
assistant.pinTooShort: I-PIN kufanele ibe nezinombolo okungenani ezi-4
assistant.autoModeEnabled: Imodi ezenzakalelayo ivuliwe - ukudluliswa kuzogunyazwa ngokuzenzakalelayo
assistant.safetyBlocked: Lokhu okuqukethwe akukwazi ukukhiqizwa kuDeHub - siyinkundla yomndeni! Zama okunye 🎨
assistant.loginRequired: Ngena ukufinyelela Umsizi futhi uvule izici ezinamandla njengokukhiqiza izithombe namavidiyo.
assistant.errorRateLimit: ⏳ Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment and try again.
assistant.errorCreditsExhausted: 💳 AI credits exhausted. Please try again later.
assistant.errorTimeout: ⏱️ Request timed out. The AI service may be busy — please try again.
assistant.errorUpstream: 🔧 AI service error ({{status}}). The AI provider is having issues. Please try again in a moment.
assistant.errorUnknown: ❌ Something went wrong: {{message}}. Please try again.
assistant.fallbackGrokNotConfigured: Using DeHub AI - Grok API key not configured

aiChat.title: Umsizi
aiChat.welcomePost:
Ngiyakwazi ukubona lokhu {{type}}. {{context}}

Ufuna ukwazi ini ngakho?
aiChat.welcomeGeneral: Sawubona! Ngingumsizi wakho. Ngibuze noma yini - ngilapha ukusiza ngemibuzo, imibono, noma ukuxoxa nje.
aiChat.errorGeneric: Uxolo, ngibe nephutha. Sicela uzame futhi.
aiChat.askAnything: Ngibuze noma yini noma ukhiqize isithombe...
aiChat.describeEdits: Chaza ukuthi lesi sithombe sihlelelwe kanjani...

commandCentre.title: Isikhungo Sokulawula
commandCentre.subscribeToCreators: Bhalisa kubadali ukubona umsebenzi wakho lapha

commandCentre.connectWalletSubscriptions: Xhuma isikhwama sakho ukubona umsebenzi wakho wokubhaliselwe

commandCentre.loginDescription: Ngena ukufinyelela isikhwama sakho nokuphatha izimali zakho.
commandCentre.crossChainCompleted: Idiphozithi ye-cross-chain iqediwe! I-{{symbol}} yamukelwe ku-Base.
commandCentre.crossChainDesc: BTC, SOL, ETH, USDC nokunye okuvela kunoma yiluphi uchungechunge
commandCentre.depositExpireNote: Ikheli lediphozithi liphelelwa yisikhathi emizuzwini engu-~10. Thumela inani eliqondile kuchungechunge olulungile.
commandCentre.depositExpired: Idiphozithi iphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uzame futhi.
commandCentre.sendCryptoToReceive: Thumela i-crypto kunoma yiluphi uchungechunge → thola {{dest}}

wallet.title: Isikhwama

wallet.importDescription: Engeza noma iyiphi ithokheni ye-ERC-20 ku-{{network}} ngokunamathisela ikheli lekhontrakthi.
wallet.name: Igama
wallet.cannotReadContract: Ayikwazi ukufunda ikhontrakthi yethokheni. Qinisekisa ukuthi ikheli lilungile.

bookmarks.title: Bhukimakhi
bookmarks.errorMessage: Kwenzeke iphutha ukulayisha amabhukimakhi akho. Sicela uzame futhi.
bookmarks.noMatchSearch: Awekho amabhukimakhi ahambelana no-"{{query}}". Zama ukusesha okunye.
bookmarks.startSaving: Qala ukugcina okuthunyelwe ngokuchofoza isithonjana sebhukimakhi kunoma yikuphi okuthunyelwe ofuna ukukugcina.
bookmarks.loginDescription: Ngena ukubona nokuphatha amabhukimakhi akho agciniwe.
bookmarks.imagesStartSaving: Bhukimakha okuthunyelwe okunezithombe futhi kuzoqoqelwa lapha.
bookmarks.likedStartSaving: Thanda okuthunyelwe ngokuthepha isithonjana senhliziyo futhi kuzovela lapha.
bookmarks.ppvStartSaving: Thenga okuqukethwe kwe-Pay-Per-View kubadali obathandayo ukuze kuvele lapha.
bookmarks.textStartSaving: Bhukimakha okuthunyelwe kombhalo kuphela futhi kuzovela lapha.
bookmarks.videosStartSaving: Bhukimakha okuthunyelwe okunamavidiyo futhi kuzoqoqelwa lapha.

careers.title: Imisebenzi ku-DeHub
careers.subtitle: Hlangana neqembu elakha ikusasa lezinkundla zokuxhumana ezingenayo indawo ephakathi
careers.intro: Sifuna abantu abanentshisekelo abafuna ukuba yingxenye yegagasi elilandelayo lezinkundla zokuxhumana. Zonke izikhundla zisebenza ekhaya ngokugcwele ngamahora aguquguqukayo.
careers.bdmAbout: Njengomphathi Wokuthuthukisa Ibhizinisi ku-DeHub uzoba amandla ashukumisayo ngemuva kwecebo lethu lobudlelwano.
careers.bdmResp1: Ukuthola nokuqinisekisa ubudlelwano obubalulekile nezinkampani ze-Web2 ne-Web3
careers.bdmResp2: Ukwakha nokuphatha umugqa wabalingani abangaba khona
careers.bdmResp4: Ukuxoxisana ngemibandela yobudlelwano nezindlela zokwabelana ngemali engenayo
careers.bdmReq1: Isipiliyoni esifakazelwe ekuthuthukiseni ibhizinisi noma ekuthengiseni kwezobuchwepheshe noma i-Web3
careers.bdmReq2: Inethiwekhi enamandla endaweni ye-crypto/Web3 kuyinzuzo enkulu
careers.bdmReq5: Intshisekelo yangempela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ezingenayo indawo ephakathi noma i-blockchain
careers.bdmComp: Lesi sikhundla sinikeza iholo elingundoqo elixoxiswayo kanye nesakhiwo sekhomishini ye-OTE engenamkhawulo.
careers.ambassadorAbout: Njengenxusa Lophawu lwe-DeHub wena ungubuso nezwi lenkundla emphakathini wakho.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Ukudala nokwabelana ngokuqukethwe kweqiniso mayelana ne-DeHub
careers.ambassadorResp2: Ukubamba iqhaza ngokukhuthala emphakathini we-DeHub ku-app
careers.ambassadorResp4: Ukuletha abasebenzisi abasha enkundleni ngenethiwekhi yakho
careers.ambassadorReq2: Intshisekelo ye-Web3, crypto noma isiko labadali
careers.footerText: Awusiboni isikhundla esifanele? Xhumana nathi ku-
careers.whyHireYouPlaceholder: Yini ekwenza ube umuntu ofanele walesi sikhundla?

prompt.seoDescription: Tshela uDeHub ukuthi yini ofuna ukuyibona futhi sizolungisa umugqa wakho wesikhathi.
prompt.headline: Yini ofuna ukuyibona?
prompt.placeholder: Olunye ulwazi nge-AI, iziqephu zemidlalo, umculo we-indie…

communities.joinToSeePosts: Joyina lo mphakathi ukuze ubone futhi udale okuthunyelwe.
communities.nameMinLength: Igama kumele okungenani libe nezinhlamvu ezi-3
communities.noPosts: Akukho okuthunyelwe okwamanje. Yiba owokuqala ukuthumela kulo mphakathi!
communities.selectCommunityHint: Khetha lo mphakathi uma udala okuthunyelwe ukuze ukuthege lapha.
communities.title: Imiphakathi

staking.airdropsDesc: Abafake idiphozithi bafanelekela ama-airdrop amathokheni akhethekile nokwabiwa kwemivuzo ebhonasi. Uma ufaka okuningi, uthola okuningi.
staking.earlyAccessDesc: Yiba owokuqala ukuzama izici ezintsha zenkundla ngaphambi kokuthi zikhishelwe wonke umuntu. Abafake idiphozithi bathola ukufinyelela okubalulekile ekukhishweni kwe-beta nakumathuluzi azayo.
staking.enhancedExperienceDesc: Jabulela okuhlangenwe nakho kwekhethelo ngemikhawulo yokulayisha ephakeme nokulungiswa kwe-UI okukhethekile.
staking.increasedLimitsDesc: Amazinga aphezulu ediphozithi avula imikhawulo yemisebenzi yezimali eyandisiwe, ukusekelwa okubalulekile, izici ezikhethekile, namandla okuvota aqinile ekuphathweni.
staking.multiChainNotice: Unamathokheni ku-BNB naku-Base. Ukufaka idiphozithi kuzokwenziwa kuchungechunge olulodwa ngesikhathi — buya kamuva ukuze ufake kolunye.
staking.profitShareDesc: Thola isabelo semali engenayo yenkundla esabiwa kubafake idiphozithi. Uma ufaka okuningi, isabelo sakho sechibi lemivuzo siba sikhulu.
staking.recentUnstakeTransactions: Imisebenzi yezimali yokuhoxisa yakamuva kuzo zonke izinhlelo
staking.reducedFeesDesc: Amazinga aphezulu ebheji avula izindleko zenkundla eziphansi — kuze kufike ku-1% nje.
staking.stakeDesc: Faka amathokheni akho ukuze uthole imivuzo.
staking.subtitle: Faka idiphozithi ukuze uvule isabelo senzuzo, izindleko eziphansi, amandla amakhulu nokunye!
staking.title: Staking
staking.trendingBoosts: Ukugqugquzelwa kokudumile — okuqukethwe kwakho kukleliswa phezulu
staking.unlockBenefits: Vula izinzuzo ezinamandla ngokufaka amathokheni akho
